Simulated Device Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="260" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Device Simulator
(asyncio background task)

• 15 devices (2 fans + 3 lights x 3 rooms)
• Occupancy-based on/off model
• Simulated clock (adjustable speed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="40" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="In-Memory Device State
(single source of truth)

status | watts | room
last_changed | on_since" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="260" x="40" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-5" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;elbow=vertical;startArrow=none;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-6" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-5" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" value="writes state
every tick" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-7" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="2. Backend (FastAPI) — Single Source of Truth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="320" x="380" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="320" x="380" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="REST API
/api/status /api/room/{name}
/api/usage /api/alerts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="270" x="405" y="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="WebSocket Endpoint
/ws/dashboard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="270" x="405" y="235" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Alert Engine
• After-hours check (9AM-5PM)
• >2hr continuous-on check
• Runs on every sim tick" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="405" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Energy Accumulator
(integrates W over time -> kWh)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="270" x="405" y="375" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="LLM Layer (Claude Haiku)
phrases bot replies
[fallback: static templates]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="270" x="405" y="435" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-15" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-16" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-17" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-12"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-18" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="3. Consumers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="320" x="780" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-19" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Web Dashboard
(single HTML/CSS/JS page)

• Live Device Status Panel
• Live Power Meter (total + per-room)
• Active Alerts Panel
• Office floor-plan (SVG, animated)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="320" x="780" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Discord Bot (discord.py)

!status !room <name> !usage
+ proactive alert posts
(calls REST API, never caches)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="320" x="780" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-21" edge="1" name="wsedge" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-19"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-22" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-21" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" value="WebSocket push
(state changes, live)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-23" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-20"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="740" y="195" /> <mxPoint x="740" y="400" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-24" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-23" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" value="REST GET
(on command)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-25" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=0.15;exitY=1;entryX=0.15;entryY=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-20"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="415" y="490" /> <mxPoint x="795" y="490" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-26" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-25" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;" value="proactive push (bonus)
on alert trigger" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-27" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="4. User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="220" x="1160" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-28" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="The Boss
(browser + Discord client)

Sees identical live state
in both interfaces" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="1160" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-29" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-19" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-28"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-30" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.7;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-28"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-31" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-30" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" value="!command" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.3" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-10" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-32" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="115" width="460" x="30" y="532.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-33" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;" value="→ solid arrow = data flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="300" x="40" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-34" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;fontColor=#b85450;" value="→ dashed red arrow = event-driven push (alert bonus)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="380" x="40" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-35" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;" value="Backend is the single source of truth: both the Web UI and the Discord Bot
read from the same REST/WebSocket API. Neither interface stores its own copy of state." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="400" x="40" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Device Simulator
(asyncio background task)
• 15 devices (2 fans + 3 lights x 3 rooms)
• Occupancy-based on/off model
• Simulated clock (adjustable speed)

The Boss
(browser + Discord client)
Sees identical live state
in both interfaces

div.div:
Backend is the single source of truth: both the Web UI and the Discord Bot
read from the same REST/WebSocket API. Neither interface stores its own copy of state.
